# Copilot Instructions

This repository is the **SIT Learning Repo** — a knowledge base that contains all SIT (Software Integration Testing / Security & Integration Testing) findings, notes, and reference material.

## How to Answer Questions

- When a question is asked in the context of this repository, **always look up and reference the content available in this repository first** before drawing on outside knowledge.
- Ground your answers in the files, documents, and findings stored here.
- If relevant content exists in this repository, cite or quote it directly in your answer.
- If the repository does not yet contain information relevant to the question, say so clearly and suggest where such information might be added.

## Repository Purpose

All SIT findings are tracked and maintained in this repository. Treat it as the authoritative source of truth for any SIT-related questions asked within this project.
